ffmpeg.notes: Place the Windows ffmpeg binary here before embedding.

ffprobe.notes: Keep ffprobe in the same release family as ffmpeg.

ffmpegOverIPClient.notes: Client binary used by AutoSync Studio when remote rendering is enabled.

ffmpegOverIPServer.notes: Server binary used by AutoSync Render Server.

patchedFFmpeg.notes: Patched ffmpeg distributed with ffmpeg-over-ip releases.

patchedFFprobe.notes: Patched ffprobe distributed with ffmpeg-over-ip releases.
